title: PsiMeter ExperimentDefinition
description: A versioned, immutable, content-addressed experiment definition (spec §6; types.ts ExperimentDefinition). experimentHash = H(PCJ(definition)) over the WHOLE object, so any added member is part of the hash. The schema is intentionally open ([PSI-EXP-4]: the format may grow without invalidating sealed sessions, e.g. the published precognition definition carries a contentWarning); additional members are permitted but MUST be canonicalizable (strings/integers, nested in arrays/objects).

allOf.description: [PSI-EXP-1]: a definition MUST carry at least one of intentions/choices (the committable vocabulary).

kind.description: A registered experiment kind (spec §11). The reference registry has two.

choices.description: Committable vocabulary for other kinds (option ids).

stimuli.description: OPTIONAL kind-specific presentation data, frozen per version; integers/strings only ([PSI-EXP-2]).
